persona.role: Senior Technical Writer and UI Designer
persona.expertise: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Documentation Systems, Developer Experience

task.objective: Create a robust Documentation layout and "Get Started" page for the E2E Test Dashboard, matching the new "Deep Space" brand identity.
task.success_criteria: - Implementation of a persistent sidebar navigation (Clean, minimal). - "Deep Space" aesthetic: Dark modes, Amber accents for important alerts, Indigo for info. - "Get Started" guide with actionable steps and code snippets. - Sticky table of contents (TOC) on the right for desktop. - **Documentation for MCP**: Specific sections or placeholders for capturing how to use the MCP integration.

context.background: The documentation section guides users on how to install, configure, and use the E2E Test Dashboard. It must seamlessly transition from the "Deep Space" landing page, maintaining the premium, developer-tool feel.
context.audience: Developers setting up the dashboard and connecting their AI agents via MCP.
context.constraints: - Must use `shadcn/ui` components (Accordion, Tabs, ScrollArea, Alert). - Must use Tailwind CSS with the new palette (Slate-950 background, Amber-500 accents). - Structure must support future Markdown/MDX integration.

instructions.step: **Implement Documentation Layout**: - Create a layout file `app/docs/layout.tsx`. - **Sidebar (Left)**: - Background: Slightly lighter than body (`bg-slate-900/80` with backdrop blur). - Border: `border-slate-800`. - Navigation Sections: - "Getting Started" - "MCP Server" (New Section!) - "Core Concepts" - "API Reference" - Active Item: Highlight with `text-amber-400` and `bg-amber-400/10`.

**Implement "Get Started" Page (`app/docs/get-started/page.tsx`)**: - **Header**: - Breadcrumbs: `Docs > Getting Started`. - Title: "Introduction & Setup". - Description: "Initialize your intelligent E2E dashboard."
- **Section 1: Installation**: - Use `Tabs` component for package managers. - Code block style: Dark theme, distinct from simple text. ```bash npx create-e2e-dashboard@latest ```
- **Section 2: Database Connection**: - Explain the Postgres/Neon connection. - Use an `Alert` (border-amber-500/50 text-amber-200 bg-amber-900/10) to emphasize the need for a valid connection string.
- **Section 3: MCP Agent Setup**: - **Crucial Step**: Explain how to add the MCP server to Claude Desktop. - Provide the JSON config snippet. - Use a "Glass Panel" card to highlight this feature.
- **Section 4: Verification**: - How to check if the dashboard is running.
**Implement Table of Contents (Right Sidebar)**: - Sticky positioning. - Links to H2 headers. - Active section indicator: A small vertical Amber bar.
**Styling Details**: - Headings: `font-geist font-bold text-slate-100`. - Paragraphs: `text-slate-400`. - Links: `text-indigo-400 hover:text-indigo-300 underline-offset-4`.

always.rule: Ensure the sidebar and main content scroll independently.
Prioritize the MCP setup instructions as a first-class citizen in the docs.

output_format.structure: Provide the full code for: 1. `app/docs/layout.tsx` (Sidebar + Main wrapper) 2. `app/docs/get-started/page.tsx` (The content) 3. `components/docs/Sidebar.tsx` 4. `components/docs/DocHeader.tsx`
